PORT.description: Port Node-RED listens on for the flow editor and HTTP API endpoints.

FLOWS.description: Flow file to load from the /data volume. Defaults to flows.json.

NODE_RED_ENABLE_PROJECTS.description: Set to true to enable Git-backed projects for version-controlled flows.

NODE_RED_ENABLE_SAFE_MODE.description: Set to true to start Node-RED without running any flows (safe mode for troubleshooting).

CREDENTIAL_SECRET.description: Encryption key for stored credentials. Auto-generated — keep this value stable to avoid re-entering credentials on redeploy.
